Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class Territory2RunOppTerrAssignmentApexPayload

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.OperationPayload
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Territory2RunOppTerrAssignmentApexPayload
public class Territory2RunOppTerrAssignmentApexPayload extends OperationPayload

Java class for Territory2RunOppTerrAssignmentApexPayload complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Territory2RunOppTerrAssignmentApexPayload">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}OperationPayload">
       <sequence>
         <element name="excludeClosedOpportunities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="opportunityCloseDateFrom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="opportunityCloseDateTo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="opportunityLastModifiedDateFrom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="opportunityLastModifiedDateTo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="territoryModelId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
